meta.project: Jaleca — 5 Small UI Changes to Improve Conversion

product_overview: A set of five low-risk, additive UI changes for the Jaleca storefront that increase trust signals, surface the loyalty program and product reviews, and improve social/share previews and indexing without changing business logic.
core_goals: Ensure site pages are indexable by search engines to improve organic visibility
Improve social share previews to increase click-through from messages and social feeds
Increase visitor trust by surfacing clear trust badges on the homepage
Make the loyalty program discoverable for anonymous visitors and show points for logged users
Surface product review summary immediately on product pages to increase conversion confidence

features.name: Meta robots tag
features.description: Add a robots meta tag (INDEX,FOLLOW) to the site metadata so search engines can index pages consistently.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Inspect page head -> See a meta robots tag with INDEX and FOLLOW present

features.name: OG image as real photo
features.description: Replace the current og image/logo with a 1200x630 lifestyle photo (public/og-home.jpg) so social previews show a product-in-context thumbnail.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View page head -> See og:image meta referencing /og-home.jpg
Navigate to / -> Share the site link in an external preview tool or social debugger -> Observe the preview uses the lifestyle image rather than the logo

features.name: Trust badges on homepage
features.description: Add a visible trust badge bar below the announcement/header that communicates secure purchase, free shipping threshold, returns, PIX discount and installment options.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See the trust badge bar below the announcement/header -> Read trust messages including free-shipping threshold, returns window and PIX discount

features.name: Loyalty visible (Club Jaleca) in header
features.description: Show a 'Club Jaleca' badge for all visitors in the header and convert it to points display for logged-in users so the loyalty program is discoverable and rewards are visible.
user_flows: Navigate to / as an anonymous visitor -> See 'Club Jaleca' badge in the header
Navigate to /minha-conta -> Register for a new account -> Return to / while logged in -> See points displayed in the header as a numeric points balance
Navigate to / while logged in and points are shown -> Open loyalty details -> See how points convert to discount

features.name: Product reviews visible under product name
features.description: Show star rating and review count immediately below the product name (above the price) so shoppers see review summary without opening the Reviews tab.
user_flows: Navigate to /produtos -> Open a product from the listing -> See the product name -> See star rating and review count directly below the product name (above price)
Navigate to /produtos -> Open a product with no reviews -> See the product name without stars or review count
Navigate to /produtos -> Open a product with reviews -> Tap the star rating -> Scroll to or open the Reviews section

tech_stack.framework: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS v3.4

tech_stack.other: Cielo (PIX/Cartão/Boleto), Brevo email, Melhor Envio, Meta Pixel + CAPI, Google Analytics 4, ContentSquare

features.name: Authentication
features.description: CPF-based login, registration, password reset, email verification

endpoints.description: Register new customer automatically from CPF lookup
Check if CPF exists in WooCommerce
Send password reset email via Brevo

features.name: Product Catalog
features.description: Product listing, filtering, search, product detail pages, variation gallery

endpoints.description: Get multiple products by slugs for comparison

features.name: Shipping Calculator
features.description: Calculate shipping with Melhor Envio (PAC, SEDEX, Jadlog), free shipping rules

endpoints.description: Calculate shipping options for given CEP and items

response_schema.200: shipping options array with price and deadline

features.name: Checkout and Payment
features.description: Full checkout flow with Cielo (PIX, Credit Card, Boleto), order creation in WooCommerce

endpoints.description: Create payment with Cielo (PIX/card/boleto) and WooCommerce order

response_schema.200: payment data with PIX QR or card result

endpoints.description: Check payment status by order ID
Receive Cielo webhook for payment confirmation

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Order listing, tracking, status updates, review requests

endpoints.description: Send internal notification email for new order

features.name: Shipment Tracking
features.description: Register tracking codes, check status via Melhor Envio webhook, notify customers

endpoints.description: Register tracking code for an order
Get tracking status for an order
Receive Melhor Envio shipment status webhook

features.name: Blog CMS
features.description: AI-powered blog with post creation, SEO optimization, image upload, categories

features.name: Wishlist
features.description: Product wishlist saved in localStorage and user account

features.name: Franchisee Popup
features.description: Geolocation-based popup showing nearest physical store

endpoints.description: Get nearest franchise by IP geolocation

features.name: Reviews
features.description: Product reviews fetched from Google Places and WooCommerce

features.name: Meta Events and Pixel
features.description: Server-side Meta Conversion API and client Pixel tracking for add-to-cart, purchase

endpoints.description: Send add-to-cart event to Meta CAPI

features.name: Virtual Try-On
features.description: AI-powered virtual try-on for jaleco products

features.name: SEO Hub Pages
features.description: Static profession hub pages (medico, enfermeiro, dentista, etc.) for topical authority

known_limitations.issue: Cielo Boleto integration pending full webhook confirmation flow
known_limitations.impact: Boleto payments may not auto-confirm without manual check

known_limitations.issue: Blog AI generation depends on Gemini API quota
known_limitations.impact: Blog generation may fail during quota exhaustion
